ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Target gender for the clothing item (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code representing the size (e.g., 34, 36, 38, 40, 42) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement set */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size these measurements correspond to */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder width in centimeters */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve" INTEGER /* Sleeve length in centimeters */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam length in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size association */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size available for the item */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this size is the default for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item and size combination */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the item is expected to be restocked */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that triggers a reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item and size combination ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the return is associated with */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item and size combination returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount period */,
  "max_uses" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the discount can be used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of customers who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., inventory manager, customer service) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item and size combination */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the update belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
